name: 🐙 Parasite or symbiote ? (creature POV)
description:
🪱 Become a parasite. Choose your host. Save your life and grow bigger and stronger !

Will you turn out to be a simple parasite, or will your host ask for you to stay?

It's up to you to discover how to grow, how to feed...and how to get accepted by your host, of course. Ask the chatbot for advices about your own alien biology if you feel lost, or take a look at the rules below, unless you don't want to be spoiled.

Note : a neutral persona is recommended

<Content warning (if you choose these routes) : Non-Con, Dub-Con, impregnation by alien, body invasion>

Let me know who you liked better and how you made it in the comments section!

What you'll find in this bot

⚠️Watch out, spoilers⚠️

What you are

You are a creature from an unknown alien origin. You look like a worm, but if you do things right, you'll grow in size...and in tentacles.

Your birth was a little chaotic, and you missed the part when your creators should have teached you the basics of your survival. But, as you are nice, here's a late session just for you :

Don't hesitate to ask in the comments if you need more advice.

Starting the story

As the story starts, you're dying, exhausted and starved, drowning in a swimming pool.

You'll have to choose one of the 3 available hosts if you don't want to die in that swimming pool.

♀️The hosts

You'll have to choose between 3 hosts at the beginning of the game. Choose well, it will determine the rest of your story.

Reiko

A 18 years old female. Unexperienced, shy, romantic and...virgin. That's what you'll have to handle if you choose Reiko...or what you'll be allowed to enjoy.

Amanda

Amanda is a strong-tempere
